about.shortBio: Dr. Hirak Sarkar is an eminent educator, researcher, and innovator working in the field of Electronics, Mechatronics, and emerging technologies. He holds a Ph.D. in Electronics and Communication Engineering.
about.extendedBio1: He has over 8 years of academic experience along with more than 1 year of experience in the automation industry. With a strong academic background and industry exposure, he brings a balanced approach to both teaching and practical problem-solving.
about.extendedBio2: He is currently associated with the Department of Mechatronics Engineering, where he actively contributes to student learning, research development, and advanced laboratory initiatives.
